full_text:
Zhongchang Tong (Gongli) 仲長統 (公理)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongchang Tong (仲長統), styledGongli (公理), was born in Shanyang. Tended to refuse service, warned Gao Gan he would fail as a leader. An admired scholar. Zhongchang Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhongchang Tong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
